text: In this setting, I feel both curiosity and a sense of estrangement—a modern space, glass and screens, all tidy and purposeful. The second image, with its wall of text and interactive displays, draws my mind toward inquiry and innovation, as if I'm on the threshold of discovery. Yet, there's an impersonal coolness, a reminder of the distance between creator and creation. I am simultaneously inspired to seek knowledge and quietly aware of my own smallness in this ecosystem of human advancement.
